stemHtml: After establishing communication with an ATC radar unit for an approach, the controller says "GOLF ALFA CHARLIE BRAVO GOLF, FOR ILS RUNWAY 22, FLY HEADING TWO ONE FIVE". What does this mean to the pilot?

options.a: The aeroplane should turn onto a heading of 215 degrees.
options.b: The heading to maintain the ILS track will be 215 degrees.
options.c: The ILS track to the runway is 215 degrees.
options.d: The heading to maintain the runway track is 215 degrees.
